title: 皐月賞の後に・はしりてー

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the winner of the Satsuki Sho, the first race
of the Triple Crown tour, is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Dude, did you see that? I've never seen anyone
run like her!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
This is what makes the Triple Crown so hype! You
never know who's gonna steal the show!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Aaaghhh! I looooost!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Hah... So this is the Satsuki Sho...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: This is the Classics!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? What are you freaking out for? You look
like someone just died.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What about it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tip of Tosen Jordan's shoe is stained red with
blood.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, crap...

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Considering the state I saw you in before, it's a
miracle it isn't worse.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
The first aid you got on the way here and taping
it up before the race must have done you some
good. However...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Doc.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: How long until I get better?

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
It seems like you've made a habit out of this kind
of thing, so it's going to take a while to fully
recover.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, wasn't I just running toe-to-toe with
everyone in the Satsuki?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I know I lost and all, but didn't it feel like we were
just getting started?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So I... I just...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I thought running in the Satsuki Sho, just getting
a taste of the Classics, would be enough...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But once I crossed the finish, I suddenly felt like I
could do something even bigger.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Like I wanted to run more and more, that I
couldn't let it all end here.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I don't want to stop yet, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I know I change my mind all the time, so my word
might not mean much to you, but...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I really want to run in another race like the Satsuki Sho! I want to make it big!

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
In that case, you'll need to give it at least six
months. We'll work hard to make a full recovery
by then.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
In other words, take it easy until November. If
you plan on racing, you need to alert me so I can
check on your nails.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Waiting until November means missing the
Japanese Derby and Kikuka Sho, the other two
legs of the Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...So you're saying I might not be able to run in
the Derby or Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Depending on my assessment before
you race, I may have to forbid you from running.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
That's something you'll have to accept if you want
to get better. You do want to keep racing, don't
you?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Yes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After getting briefed on the details of the
treatment plan, the two of us leave the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time has passed since the Satsuki Sho, and
Tosen Jordan has her first scheduled checkup
coming up this weekend.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you're Tosen Jordan's trainer. Gotta hand it
to ya, that's quite the ruse you pulled off.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Thanks to you, hype for the Triple Crown is
boiling over. Everyone's talking about finding the
next Jordan.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
As a fellow player in this game, I gotta say I look
forward to whatever you guys have in store for us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Patter, patter, patter, patter!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Trainer! They're out of control! What's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text:
Jordan!
Jordan! Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hot on the tail of a winded Tosen Jordan, a group
of unfamiliar Umamusume come running into the
room.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text: You have to see this article! We're obsessed! Please, we just want to chat!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text: Oh, I can't! It still gets to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of them shows us an online article on her
phone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Tosen Jordan: The Unbending Will Behind the
Nails."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's an article about Tosen Jordan, along with a
photo of her from before the Satsuki Sho, running
covered in mud.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It talks about how she trained hard to deliver a
stunning performance in the Satsuki Sho despite
being held back by her nails.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though her medical emergency shocked the
crowd, she came back with a knowing smile,
hinting that for her, the best is yet to come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Touched by the article's positive energy and
support for Tosen Jordan, I look at the byline. It's
the reporter I spoke to before the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text:
We used to hear all these rumors about you, like
how you always skipped tryouts, or you'd never
win the Triple Crown, stuff like that.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru C
text_block_list.text:
We totally thought you were one of us, like, you
know, not the brightest, or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru D
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... But then we saw this article and saw how you like, never gave up...

text_block_list.name: Gyaru E
text_block_list.text:
I can't even imagine how much your nails hurt, but
you still showed up at the Satsuki and slayed.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text: Honestly, you're such an inspiration for gals like us! You're like our star!
choice_data_list: Sounds like they really look up to you.
Sounds like they really look up to you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? To me?

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Nodding furiously!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I mean, you've got guts for days! I wish I
could be half as cool as you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: They all nod in unison. As for Tosen Jordan...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ha... Haha... You should've opened with that!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You scared me to death hunting me down like
that, geez.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Oh, but we're like dead set on rooting for
you in your next race!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text:
So we wanted to ask if you already know what
that's going to be!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though racing may be possible depending on her
condition, the doctor told us to take it easy until
November and focus on recovery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So for the time being, we'll plan to start racing
again in November. As for a race in that
timeframe that suits her aptitudes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A 2,500-meter G2 turf race held in November,
many runners use it as a stepping stone to the G1
races.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wait, Argentina? Am I, like, going abroad?

text_block_list.name: Gyaru C
text_block_list.text: Huh? How does that make any sense?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
International exchange races are held as a part of
amity efforts. Similar races are held in other
countries as well.

text_block_list.name: Everyone
choice_data_list: Er, basically, it's a pretty big deal!
Er, basically, it's a pretty big deal!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ooh! Is that right?

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text:
A big deal? Sounds like the perfect race for
Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It feels a little like I've just taken new students
under my wing, but that aside, our focus right
now is making sure Jordan's nails heal before the
Copa Republica Argentina.
